maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of items to collect

maxDetailPages.title: Max Detail Pages
maxDetailPages.description: Maximum Proxibid detail pages to fetch per run for VIN/mileage enrichment before pushing rows

targetCategories.title: Target Categories
targetCategories.description: Comma-separated Proxibid car category slugs to scrape, e.g. sedans,suv-s,coupes. Empty means all configured car subcategories.
